name: symbio-openpaw
summary: OpenPaw is a **personal assistant** that runs in your own environment. It talks to you over multiple channels (DingTalk, Feishu, QQ, Discord, iMessage, etc.) and runs scheduled tasks according to your configuration. **What it can do is driven by Skills — the possibilities are open-ended.** Built-in skills include cron, news digest, file reading, and more; you can add custom skills. All data and tasks run on your machine; no third-party hosting. Derived from CoPaw (Apache 2.0).
